surface.name: Integrated embedding index via cURL (API key + Starter plan)
surface.selection_basis: Pinecone documents REST cURL for create-for-model, upsert text, and search with text. The general Quickstart requires an account/API key and offers Starter (free) among plans. An SDK install is not required when using the documented HTTP paths.

alternatives_considered.name: Python SDK quickstart path
alternatives_considered.reason_not_primary: SDK convenience for the same create/upsert/search flow; REST cURL is documented for each operation.

alternatives_considered.name: AI coding-tool plugin quickstart
alternatives_considered.reason_not_primary: Requires another vendor's coding tool; not a deterministic cURL path.

alternatives_considered.name: n8n no-code path
alternatives_considered.reason_not_primary: Adds n8n and often a second LLM vendor key.

entry_point.developer_intent: Create a Pinecone account and API key on Starter (or equivalent), create an integrated embedding index, upsert sample text, and receive search hits over HTTPS.
assumed_prior_state: No Pinecone account, API key, index, or records are assumed.
A terminal with cURL is available; no language SDK is assumed.

documented_first_success.normalized_outcome: After cURL create-for-model and upsert text, a cURL search with text against the index host returns result.hits.
documented_first_success.observable_completion_signal: POST .../records/namespaces/{namespace}/search returns JSON with result.hits containing matching record ids and fields.

boundary_evidence.official_label_or_terminal_state: API reference documents cURL for POST /indexes/create-for-model, upsert text to /records/namespaces/{namespace}/upsert, and search with text to /records/namespaces/{namespace}/search returning hits.

documented_first_success.why_this_is_the_boundary: The first meaningful vector-DB success is authenticated search hits over indexed text. Official REST docs cover create, upsert, and search with cURL, so an SDK is optional. Starter is free with limits; paid Builder/Standard are alternatives, not required for the Starter first path. Optional rerank is excluded from the required first success.

prerequisites.requirement: A Pinecone account that can open the console and create API keys.
A selected plan with capacity for a serverless integrated index. Starter is free with limits; Builder and Standard trial are paid/credit alternatives documented on the Quickstart.
A Pinecone API key sent as Api-Key on control-plane and data-plane requests.
A terminal with cURL (or any HTTP client). No language SDK is required.

primary_path.action: Sign up for Pinecone at app.pinecone.io and choose a plan (Starter free, or Builder / Standard trial).
details: Quickstart: after signup you receive an API key in the console.
primary_path.output: Authenticated Pinecone organization on a selected plan
primary_path.success_signal: Console shows the account and plan.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: Plan limits and available regions differ by plan.

primary_path.action: Confirm Starter (free) capacity is sufficient, or activate Builder / Standard trial credits if choosing a paid path.
details: Starter is free with limits and one cloud region.
Standard trial documents time- and credit-limited access.
primary_path.output: Plan eligible to create a serverless index
primary_path.success_signal: Console shows an active plan that can create indexes.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: Quota or region limits may require upgrade.

primary_path.action: Create or copy a Pinecone API key and store it securely.
primary_path.success_signal: The key value is available locally.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: No manual approval wait is documented for key creation.

primary_path.output: Key available to HTTP clients in the shell
primary_path.success_signal: The environment variable is set for the current shell.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: Shell persistence depends on the OS.

primary_path.action: Create an integrated embedding index with cURL POST to https://api.pinecone.io/indexes/create-for-model.
details: Use embed.model llama-text-embed-v2 and field_map text→chunk_text as in the create-for-model cURL example.
Capture the returned host for data-plane calls; wait until the index is ready.
primary_path.success_signal: create-for-model returns index metadata including host.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: Index may report Initializing before ready; region/plan limits can reject create.

primary_path.action: Upsert sample text with cURL to https://$INDEX_HOST/records/namespaces/$NAMESPACE/upsert.
details: Content-Type: application/x-ndjson with records containing _id and chunk_text.
Allow a short wait for records to become searchable.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: Invalid field_map mismatch or auth errors fail the upsert.

primary_path.action: Search with text via cURL POST to https://$INDEX_HOST/records/namespaces/$NAMESPACE/search and confirm hits.
details: Send query.inputs.text and top_k; rerank is optional and not required for first success.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: Empty hits may mean records are not yet visible; wait briefly and retry.

branches.condition: The developer prefers the official SDK.
branches.path: pip install pinecone and use create_index_for_model, upsert_records, and search as on the Quickstart.
branches.effect_on_first_success: Adds package install; same index and search boundary.

branches.path: Include rerank.model bge-reranker-v2-m3 in the search body as shown in the search-with-text docs.
branches.effect_on_first_success: Optional after basic hits; not required for first success.

friction_gates.description: Signup and plan selection are required before API key and index creation.
Api-Key header is required on control-plane and data-plane calls.
New indexes may initialize before ready; upserted records may take a few seconds to become searchable.

sources.title: Create an index with integrated embedding

uncertainties.question: Whether every Starter signup still auto-surfaces an API key without a separate key-creation screen.
uncertainties.impact: Credential step may be one or two console clicks.
uncertainties.reason_unresolved: Quickstart says you receive a key after signup and also documents creating a new key in console.

excluded_after_success: Builder/Standard paid upgrades beyond Starter first success
